title: Crumbly Canadian Garlic Nut Crumble
description: This low-fat-friendly brunch dish features ground nut oil and caramelize to create a garlicky, crumbly texture.
instructions: In a mixing bowl, combine ground peanut oil with garlic powder and salt. Mix well to ensure all ingredients are evenly distributed.
Add the minced garlic into the mixture and stir thoroughly until it’s fully incorporated.
Transfer the crumble mix onto a baking sheet lined with parchment paper for easy cleanup.
Bake in preheated oven at 350°F (175°C) for 20-25 minutes or until golden brown and crisp on top.
Remove from oven, let cool slightly before serving. Garnish with fresh herbs if desired.
